description: Style NoteThe perfect blend of beauty and style, this handmade necklace from adrika adds a touch of glamour to your wardrobe. Pair it with any outfit for a chic and bold look.Product DetailsSingle stranded silver coloured chain with black beads, metal claspMaterial and CareGlass beads with brass fittings and nickel polishWipe with soft cloth to maintain shine and keep away dust and dirtSizeLength of necklace: 132 cm
